title: Dara and the Shy Little Bunny
synopsis: When Dara finds a scared little bunny hiding under the playground slide at school, she uses kindness and patience to help her new friend feel brave and happy again.

pages.text: Dara loved playing at school. She had beautiful dark curls and wore her favorite purple dress with yellow flowers. Today, she was playing with blocks when she heard a soft sniffling sound. "Who's crying?" Dara wondered. She felt worried about the sad sound.

illustration.description: A cheerful preschool classroom with colorful building blocks scattered on a blue carpet. Dara, a young Black girl with bouncy dark curls and a bright purple dress with yellow flower patterns, looks up from her blocks with a concerned expression. Sunlight streams through large windows, and other diverse children play in the background.
illustration.alt: Dara looking concerned in a bright preschool classroom

pages.text: Under the big slide outside, Dara found a small white bunny with floppy ears. The bunny looked very scared and was shaking. "Don't be afraid, little bunny," Dara said gently. "I want to help you." The bunny's eyes were wide and frightened.

illustration.description: A colorful playground scene with a large red and yellow slide. Dara kneels down beside a small, fluffy white bunny with long ears who is trembling under the slide. The bunny has big, scared eyes. Dara's expression is gentle and caring as she reaches out slowly. Green grass and blue sky create a cheerful backdrop.
illustration.alt: Dara finding a scared white bunny under the playground slide

pages.text: "Are you lost?" Dara asked softly. She sat down quietly next to the bunny, not too close. The bunny stopped shaking a little bit. Dara smiled her warmest smile. "My name is Dara. What's your name?" she whispered. The bunny's ears perked up just a tiny bit.

illustration.description: Dara sits cross-legged on the green grass next to the white bunny, maintaining a respectful distance. Her warm smile radiates kindness, and the bunny's ears are slightly more upright, showing curiosity. The scene has soft, warm lighting with the playground equipment in the background and other children playing safely in the distance.
illustration.alt: Dara sitting peacefully with the bunny, both looking more relaxed

pages.text: "Luna," whispered the bunny in the tiniest voice. Dara felt so happy to hear her speak! "That's a beautiful name, Luna," Dara said. "Would you like to play with me and my friends? We're very nice." Luna looked brave for the first time and nodded yes. They walked to the playground together, and Luna felt safe and happy with her new friend Dara.

illustration.description: Dara and Luna walking together across the playground toward a group of diverse children playing. Dara has her hand gently extended, and Luna hops alongside her with a much happier expression. In the background, children of different ethnicities are playing together - a Latino boy on swings, an Asian girl on a seesaw, and others building in a sandbox. Everyone looks welcoming and joyful.
illustration.alt: Dara and Luna walking happily toward other children playing

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Dara feel when she heard the crying sound?
questions.explanation: Dara felt worried when she heard someone crying because she cared about others.

questions.question: Where was Luna hiding?
questions.explanation: Luna was hiding under the big slide on the playground because she felt scared.

questions.question: How did Luna feel at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: Luna felt scared and was shaking when Dara first found her.

questions.question: How did Luna feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Luna felt happy and safe with her new friend Dara by the end of the story.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words!
pages.text: Dara found a small white _____ under the slide. The bunny looked very _____ and was shaking.

pages.title: Complete the Sentence!
pages.text: Luna felt _____ and _____ with her new friend Dara.
